title: ON STREET EV CHARGING INFRASTRUCTURE
description: Dundee City Council is proposing to let a concession contract for the installation and operation of the charge points to be installed as part of the Transport Scotland (TS) Electric Vehicle Infrastructure Fund (EVIF).

title: Civils, Buildings, OHL and UGC Framework – Multi Site
description:
This procurement establishes a multi-lot framework for civils, buildings, overhead line and underground cable works across Scottish Hydro Electric Transmission’s large capital delivery portfolio in Scotland. 
The framework covers six lots: 
-civils works up to £10m
-civils works over £10m
-buildings and infrastructure 
-overhead line pole construction 
-overhead line tower construction 
-underground cable construction
It is intended to appoint long-term strategic partners with the capability and capacity to deliver design, management, construction, testing and completion works, supporting network investment, renewal, customer connections and the transition to net zero. The framework has a potential total value of up to £7.4 billion, with lot specific framework appointed for a period up to eight years.

title: 4.8MW Substation design and installation
description: Design and construction of 4.8 MW substation on the island of Eday, Orkney

title: 60Hz Transformer Purchase
description: This is for the purchase of 60 Hz Transformers for Portsmouth Naval Base.
